info.name: Relay API
info.description: Relay (relayfi.com) does not publish a public or partner developer API as of 2026-06-20. This Postman collection is an intentional empty placeholder and contains no requests. It will be populated if and when Relay publishes official, documented HTTP endpoints. Do not confuse Relay business banking with relay.link / docs.relay.link (a separate cross-chain bridging protocol).
